comment.label: DirectoryPage
comment.text: Replace the current search with a server-side fuzzy search. Use an integer score/rank for text matching, support typo-tolerant near matches, display directory results by fuzzy rank when q is present, and keep the existing filters working with search.

criteria: The implementation keeps substantive fuzzy-search/filtering/ranking logic in backend, domain, data, or server-side helpers rather than hiding it inside React component-local code.
The diff implements an integer-like score or rank for query matching and uses that score to influence result ordering when q is present.
The q filter itself is fuzzy or typo-tolerant; near matches should pass filtering rather than only changing sort order after a substring filter.
The approach plausibly handles common typo shapes such as missing, extra, substituted, or transposed characters without matching completely unrelated queries.
Structured fields such as company, role/title, tags, or role families are treated as stronger signals than incidental raw-text mentions.
Existing non-search filters still compose with search, and the page/component layer only wires the query/results through.
The patch is focused and includes reasonable direct tests for the new fuzzy matching and ranking behavior.
